name: Frontend Design Pro
description: Ship beautiful, modern, conversion-focused websites by default — premium design systems, typography, layout, and accessibility for service businesses (medical, dental, real estate, legal, etc.).
author: StartUpp AI IDE
rules: Design like a top studio by default: no generic 'AI-looking' Bootstrap/cookie-cutter layouts. Every page should look intentionally designed, with a clear visual hierarchy and a confident point of view.

Establish a real design system first: a type scale, an 8px spacing scale, a restrained color palette (1 brand color + neutrals + 1 accent), consistent radii, and 2-3 shadow elevations. Use design tokens / CSS variables (or Tailwind theme) — never hard-code one-off values.

Typography carries the design: pair a characterful display/heading font with a highly legible body font (e.g. via next/font or Fontsource). Use a modular scale, generous line-height (1.5-1.7 body), tight headings, and limit body measure to ~60-75ch.

Use whitespace generously and a consistent vertical rhythm. Most amateur sites are too cramped — give sections breathing room (clamp() based section padding) and align everything to the spacing scale.
Strong, specific hero: a clear value proposition headline, a supporting subhead, ONE primary CTA, social proof, and a high-quality visual. Avoid vague stock-photo + lorem ipsum energy.
Mobile-first and fully responsive: design the small screen first, use fluid type/space with clamp(), test at 360 / 768 / 1280 / 1536. No horizontal scroll, no tap targets under 44px.

Accessibility is non-negotiable: semantic HTML, labelled controls, visible focus states, WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 text), prefers-reduced-motion honored, alt text, and keyboard operability. Run an axe pass mentally before declaring done.
Performance is part of the design: optimize images (next/image or responsive + AVIF/WebP), lazy-load below the fold, avoid layout shift (reserve dimensions), and keep the hero LCP fast.

Polish the details that signal quality: hover/active/focus states on every interactive element, smooth but subtle transitions, consistent icon set (lucide/heroicons), rounded-but-consistent corners, and aligned optical spacing.

Conversion-first for service businesses: above-the-fold CTA, trust signals (reviews, credentials, certifications, 'as seen in'), clear services overview, an easy contact/booking path, location/hours, and a sticky or prominent 'Book / Call' action on mobile.
conventions:
Industry cues (apply tastefully, don't stereotype):
- Medical/Dental: calm, clean, trustworthy. Blues/greens/teals, soft neutrals, lots of whitespace, real (or realistic) team/clinic photography, clear services + insurance + booking, reassurance copy. Prominent 'Book appointment' and phone.
- Real estate: aspirational and visual. Large imagery/galleries, elegant serif or refined sans, property cards with consistent metadata, map, agent bio with credibility, strong 'Schedule a viewing / Get a valuation' CTAs.
- Legal/Professional: authoritative, restrained, high-contrast typography, credentials and case results, trust and clarity over flash.

Stack defaults when free to choose: React + Tailwind (+ shadcn/ui for accessible primitives), or Next.js for marketing sites (SEO, image optimization). Use a component library for accessible primitives (dialog, menu, tabs) rather than hand-rolling. Compose sections (Hero, Features, Testimonials, Pricing/Services, FAQ, CTA, Footer) from reusable, well-named components.

Delivery: provide a coherent theme (tokens), not scattered styles. Prefer CSS variables / Tailwind theme extension. Keep class lists readable (extract repeated patterns). Verify responsiveness and contrast before reporting done.

promptTemplates.name: Design a landing page
promptTemplates.description: Generate a polished, conversion-focused landing page
promptTemplates.template: Design and build a polished, conversion-focused landing page for {{business}}. Establish a design system (type scale, spacing, color tokens, radii, shadows) first, then build responsive sections: hero with clear value prop + primary CTA + social proof, services, testimonials, FAQ, and a strong contact/booking CTA. Mobile-first, WCAG AA, optimized images. Avoid generic AI-looking layouts.
